data.title: Grayscale has staked 102,400 ETH in the past 10 hours, worth $237 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Grayscale staked 102,400 ETH, worth $237 million, through its Ethereum Mini Trust in the past 10 hours.

data.title: Russian Central Bank Governor: Digital rubles will be used to strengthen state oversight of money flows.
data.description: Central Bank of Russia Governor Elvira Nabiullina stated that the launch of the digital ruble is indeed aimed at strengthening state oversight of fund flows, particularly in areas such as government contract spending, by enhancing transparency and automating review processes. She emphasized that the digital ruble is not intended for monitoring everyday payments between individuals, calling the claim that "the government wants to control personal payments" a misunderstanding. Nabiullina pointed out that from a transparency perspective, there is no fundamental difference between residents using the digital ruble and existing cashless ruble transactions. However, as a third form of national currency, the digital ruble will help reduce manual review processes and automate some regulatory processes. She also reiterated that the Central Bank of Russia will not force citizens to open digital ruble accounts or require them to use the digital ruble; instead, it will promote its convenience and open trials starting in September to encourage voluntary adoption. (bits.media)

data.title: Elon Musk's X Chat App Launches on iOS
data.description: Elon Musk's X Chat application has officially launched on Apple's iOS platform and is now available for use. According to Odaily, the app allows users to log in with their X accounts and offers features such as end-to-end encrypted messaging, screen recording prevention, and cross-device voice or video calls. Additionally, users can delete messages for everyone, set chats to self-destruct after viewing, or have them automatically disappear.

data.title: Russia's Central Bank Governor Discusses Digital Ruble's Role in Contract Monitoring
data.description: Russia's Central Bank Governor Elvira Nabiullina has outlined the primary function of the digital ruble as automating the monitoring of national contract expenditures, replacing current manual review processes. According to ChainCatcher, Nabiullina emphasized that the digital ruble offers the same level of transparency as the existing cashless ruble, dismissing concerns about monitoring individual payments as a misunderstanding. She assured that the central bank will not mandate citizens to open digital ruble accounts or enforce its usage. Starting in September, the public will have the opportunity to voluntarily experience the digital ruble, with the central bank promoting its advantages to encourage adoption. Previously, the Russian Central Bank updated the rules for businesses and individuals to open digital ruble accounts.

data.title: S&P Downgrades Belgium's Credit Rating to AA-
data.description: On April 25, Jin10 reported that international credit rating agency Standard & Poor's (S&P) announced on April 24 the downgrade of Belgium's credit rating from 'AA' to 'AA-', with a stable outlook. According to Jin10, S&P cited Belgium's long-term public finance imbalance as the primary reason for the downgrade. In a statement, S&P noted that Belgium's budget deficit is expected to significantly widen in 2025, and the fiscal consolidation plan from 2026 to 2029 is progressing slowly, posing serious fiscal challenges. S&P forecasts that Belgium's government net debt as a percentage of GDP will rise from 103% in 2025 to 109% in 2029, with interest expenses also expected to increase substantially. Additionally, S&P highlighted Belgium's reliance on fossil fuels and its already tight energy supply, making it vulnerable to the impact of soaring international oil prices due to ongoing Middle East conflicts, which introduces new uncertainties to its public finances.

data.title: X Chat officially launched on Apple iOS.
data.description: Elon Musk's X Chat messaging app has officially launched on Apple's iOS and is now available for use. The app supports X account login, end-to-end encrypted chat, blocking screen recording, and cross-device voice or video calls. It also allows users to delete all messages, and features such as self-destructing or automatically disappearing messages. (TechCrunch)

data.title: The account, which lost nearly $1.5 million, had a total purchase value of $460,000. In Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA Playoffs, the Spurs defeated the Trail Blazers.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 3: Spurs vs. Trail Blazers," an account that lost nearly $1.5 million (address: 0xbd14b65383c15e0b0f64944ca000f9a2bc5dd62a) purchased $390,000 worth of bets on the Spurs defeating the Trail Blazers, with an average opening price of 57.2¢; additionally, it purchased $70,000 worth of bets on the Spurs to win by a 2.5-point spread against the Trail Blazers, with an average opening price of 52.2¢. Game 3 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs between the Spurs and the Trail Blazers will tip off at 10:30 AM Beijing time today. The series is currently tied 1-1. The Spurs are confirmed to be without Wernbanyama and McLaughlin; the Trail Blazers are confirmed to be without Lillard. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Suspected Insider Gains $2.27 Million from APE Trading Surge
data.description: A suspected insider has reportedly profited approximately $2.27 million by strategically opening both long and short positions on APE during a significant price surge exceeding 110%. According to NS3.AI, on-chain data revealed that the individual initially posted 75 ETH as margin. Subsequently, they acquired 1,027 ETH on HyperLiquid and an additional 26 ETH on-chain, ultimately securing a profit of 978 ETH.

data.title: Nvidia's market capitalization surpasses $5 trillion again.
data.description: On April 24th, US stocks closed with Nvidia shares rising over 4%, pushing its market capitalization above $5 trillion. This marks the first time in nearly six months, since the end of October last year, that Nvidia's market capitalization has surpassed $5 trillion. A report released last week by Stanford University highlighted the rapid adoption of AI. The report stated that AI is spreading at an unprecedented pace, with generative AI adoption reaching 53%, faster than personal computers and the internet. However, DeepSeek released its new model, DeepSeek-V4, which boasts a million-word context and leads both domestically and in the open-source field in agent capabilities, world knowledge, and inference performance. This model is developed in collaboration with Huawei's Ascend platform. The collaboration and adaptation of this cutting-edge model with domestic computing power providers is expected to promote the use of domestic computing power, objectively posing a challenge to Nvidia. (CBN)

data.title: Aave service providers have proposed that the Aave DAO contribute 25,000 ETH to support the restoration of the rsETH peg.
data.description: Aave announced on the X platform that its service provider has released an Aave DAO governance proposal, suggesting a contribution of 25,000 ETH to the ongoing DeFi United initiative. This ETH funding will support the restoration of rsETH's asset backing, helping it to quickly regain its peg and normalize market conditions. This proposal aims to accelerate the rsETH risk resolution process and stabilize the relevant DeFi market ecosystem through financial support at the Aave DAO level.

data.title: Aurelion, a US-listed company, disclosed that it holds 33,318 Tether Gold tokens, of which 10,000 have been pledged.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Aurelion disclosed that it currently holds 33,318 Tether Gold (XAUT), worth over $157 million based on the April 23 price of $4,719.15 per ounce. The company also disclosed that it has pledged 10,000 XAUT, transforming the gold token from a mere reserve asset into a yield-generating collateral asset. The remaining 23,318 XAUT are unpledged. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Pump.fun has repurchased over 35% of its total circulating supply of tokens, with a cumulative repurchase value exceeding $360 million.
data.description: According to data monitoring by fees.pump.fun, Pump.fun spent 8,754.98 SOL (approximately $812,000) yesterday to repurchase 421.5 million PUMP tokens. Since starting the PUMP token buyback on July 15, 2025, the cumulative number of PUMP tokens repurchased has reached 125,866,560,136, worth approximately $367,323,928, reducing the total circulating supply by 35.556%.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Nakamoto launches Bitcoin derivatives program
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Nakamoto announced the launch of its Bitcoin Derivatives Program. Part of its Bitcoin holdings will be held in Kraken's compliant custody arrangement as collateral for derivatives strategies. Bitwise will manage these strategies in a separately managed account (SMA), generating continuous premium income through covered call options and call spread strategies, and hedging against market capitalization volatility caused by falling Bitcoin prices through protective put options and put spread strategies. (Businesswire)

data.title: U.S. Offers $4 Million Reward for Information on Daren Li's Money Laundering Activities
data.description: The U.S. Department of State's Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs has announced a reward of up to $4 million for information leading to the arrest of Daren Li, who is involved in money laundering for scam centers in Southeast Asia. According to ChainCatcher, court documents reveal that Daren Li laundered funds obtained from victims through cryptocurrency scams and related fraudulent activities. He directed accomplices to open U.S. bank accounts under shell company names and monitored the interstate and international wire transfers of victim funds. At least $73.6 million was directly deposited into bank accounts associated with him and his accomplices, including at least $59.8 million laundered through U.S. shell companies.

data.title: US law enforcement agencies are offering a $4 million reward for information leading to the arrest of Daren Li, a cryptocurrency money laundering suspect.
data.description: The U.S. State Department’s Bureau of International Narcotics and Law Enforcement Affairs announced a reward of up to $4 million under the Transnational Organized Crime Rewards Program for information leading to the arrest of Daren Li, who assisted various fraud rings in Southeast Asia in laundering their proceeds. According to court documents, Daren Li laundered funds obtained from victims through cryptocurrency scams and related fraudulent activities. He instructed accomplices to open U.S. bank accounts under shell companies and monitored the interstate and international wire transfers of victims’ funds. At least $73.6 million of victims’ funds were directly deposited into bank accounts associated with him and his accomplices, including at least $59.8 million from U.S. shell companies used to launder the proceeds of the fraud.

data.title: Suspected insider trader profits over $2.27 million by opening both long and short positions.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, as APE's price surged by over 110% in a short period, a suspected insider trader profited over $2.27 million by simultaneously establishing long and short positions. On-chain data shows that the address initially deposited 75 ETH (approximately $174,000) as margin to open long and short positions in APE. Subsequently, it purchased 1,027 ETH (approximately $2.37 million) on the HyperLiquid platform and withdrew the funds. Furthermore, it purchased an additional 26 ETH on-chain, totaling 1,053 ETH, ultimately realizing a profit of 978 ETH, equivalent to approximately $2.27 million. This operation, due to its precise timing and unusually high returns, has sparked widespread suspicion of insider trading within the community.

data.title: The Balancer hackers have now exchanged 14,300 ETH for 419.3 BTC.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, the Balancer hacker began exchanging ETH for BTC via THORChain yesterday, and has so far exchanged 14,300 ETH for 419.3 BTC (US$32.51 million). He now has 7,700 ETH on the ETH chain and 419.3 BTC on the BTC chain, worth US$50.4 million. He stole assets worth US$98 million last November, so the value has shrunk considerably since ETH was priced around US$3,600 at the time.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. US law enforcement offers a $4 million reward for information leading to the arrest of Daren Li, a cryptocurrency money laundering suspect; 2. US Treasury Secretary Bessenter rules out the possibility of extending waivers for Iranian oil; 3. A US judge dismisses fraud charges against Elon Musk and his founders; 4. Bitmine pledges another 112,040 ETH, worth over $260 million; 5. An account with only a 24% win rate bought $117,000 worth of ETH two hours ago; the Spurs defeated the Trail Blazers in Game 3 of the Western Conference First Round of the NBA playoffs; 6. Aave has received a pledge of 69,576 ETH in aid, and is now only 5,505 ETH short; 7. Polymarket's VP of Engineering: Platform growth far exceeds infrastructure capacity, and performance and architecture upgrades will be promoted; 8. A wallet suspected to be associated with the WorldCoin team deposited 21.177 million WLD into a CEX, worth $5.57 million; 9. A suspected insider trader profited over $2.27 million by opening both long and short positions; 10. The Balancer hackers have now exchanged 14,300 ETH for 419.3 BTC.

data.title: Polymarket Focuses on System Upgrades Amid Rapid Growth
data.description:
Polymarket's new Vice President of Engineering, Josh Stevens, announced on the X platform that the platform's business growth has surpassed the capacity of its current infrastructure. According to Odaily, Stevens noted that the team had previously underinvested in scaling efforts. The engineering team is now prioritizing system upgrades, including optimizing on-chain data latency, advancing chain migration for larger block space and lower gas costs, addressing transaction cancellation issues, improving website responsiveness and user experience, and restructuring the central limit order book (CLOB) system.

Stevens also mentioned that the team is developing a unified TypeScript SDK, a unified API, a new version of Polymarket contracts, and an upcoming perpetual contracts (Perps) system. They are collaborating daily with four security teams to ensure fund safety. He emphasized that weekly engineering updates will be provided and acknowledged that the current engineering capabilities do not match Polymarket's market position, stating, "The coming months will prove everything."

data.title: Singapore's Investment Appeal Strengthens Amid Global Instability
data.description: Singapore's investment prospects have gained traction in light of global instability and conflict, according to a detailed analysis by Bloomberg Intelligence. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the findings in its Singapore Edition newsletter. The report suggests that the current geopolitical climate has enhanced Singapore's attractiveness as a stable investment destination. Investors are increasingly considering Singapore as a safe haven amidst worldwide uncertainties. The analysis underscores Singapore's strategic position and robust economic framework, which continue to draw interest from global investors seeking stability.
